stateReason: DiscordOS owns the single-writer board and publication plane. Current owner work is limited to evidence-backed admission, integrity, projection, maintainability, and security outcomes.

workItems.title: Canonical board and publication writer foundations
workItems.goal: Keep DiscordOS as the only admitted Discord board and publication writer with guarded apply, idempotency, and exact readback boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Board and publication mutations route through DiscordOS-owned commands.
Apply paths fail closed without explicit mutation authority.
Successful writes require exact live readback and correlated receipts.

workItems.title: Mazer board-truth reconciliation
workItems.goal: Reconcile stale Mazer board projections, duplicate identities, card bodies, journals, reactions, and completion state against current live readback.
acceptanceCriteria: Current Mazer cards have stable unique identities.
Canonical bodies and journals preserve current lifecycle truth.
Completion and reaction state are backed by exact live readback.

workItems.title: DiscordOS owner-work registry and deterministic board export
workItems.goal: Replace Atlas-attributed DiscordOS candidates with an owner-governed machine registry and contract-valid deterministic export.
acceptanceCriteria: Completed and non-complete owner work are explicitly separated.
Every exported card has stable identity, lifecycle, evidence, dependencies, and acceptance criteria.
Export generation is deterministic and never authorizes Discord mutation.

workItems.title: Admit and seed seven missing project boards
workItems.goal: Create the missing Atlas, DiscordOS, Foundation, Lifeline, Cortex, _stack, and Playbook forums, admit their owner adapters, and seed current owner exports through the single writer.
acceptanceCriteria: Each missing project forum is created once under the canonical Project Feedback Boards category and read back by exact channel identity.
Every registry entry names its admitted owner adapter and stable forum channel ID.
Owner exports seed idempotently with exact card and journal readback; the explicit empty _stack export creates no cards.
No source priority, lifecycle, or ownership value is guessed during admission.

workItems.title: Close cross-project board integrity and lifecycle proof
workItems.goal: Prove the fixed ten-unit board integrity denominator across every admitted project, board, and card class with recurring fail-closed drift detection.
acceptanceCriteria: All ten integrity units have current code, tests, and denominator-wide live readback or an explicit accepted not-applicable disposition.
Structural legacy drift is repaired or durably classified without deleting immutable Discord system history.
A recurring scanner fails closed on identity, lifecycle, reaction, journal, encoding, writer, or readback drift.
The Atlas marker moves only after evidence satisfies the fixed binary denominator.

workItems.title: Run an Atlas GitHub projection no-send canary
workItems.goal: Validate the GitHub projection pipeline with real Atlas-produced intent and receipt artifacts before separately authorizing any live Discord publication.
acceptanceCriteria: A real Atlas projection intent and correlated source receipt pass the DiscordOS no-send consumer.
Replay and idempotency behavior are proven without resolving secrets or sending messages.
Any later live canary remains separately approval-gated and requires exact Discord readback.

workItems.title: Converge recursive command families
workItems.goal: Retain, alias, or retire recursive and excessively long DiscordOS command families without losing supported behavior or evidence history.
acceptanceCriteria: Every current command family is classified as canonical, compatibility alias, deprecated, or retired.
Canonical commands preserve supported behavior and deterministic tests.
Compatibility and migration guidance prevents silent operator breakage.
Package scripts and documentation no longer grow through recursive name chaining.

workItems.title: Disposition DiscordOS Supabase security-advisor findings
workItems.goal: Re-read the current DiscordOS Supabase security-advisor state and close or explicitly accept every owner-scoped finding without weakening runtime boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Current advisor findings are re-read from the authoritative DiscordOS project before planning changes.
Every owner-scoped finding has a fixed, accepted, or not-applicable disposition with evidence.
Any schema or policy mutation is separately scoped, migration-backed, and verified.
No secret value is logged, committed, or copied into the board export.
